debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 1 < n
⊢ ↑n.factorial > chapter2.e * (↑n / chapter2.e) ^ n

failed_attempts:
induction' n using Nat.induction_on with n ih
  · contradiction
  · rcases lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hn) with hn | rfl
    · have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
      have h₁ : (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ n < e := by
        rw [← log_lt_log_iff (pow_pos (by positivity) _) (exp_pos _), log_pow, log_exp]
        have : log (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) < 1 / n := by
          refine (Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity) (ne_of_gt ?_)).trans_eq (add_sub_cancel_right _ _)
          exact lt_add_of_pos_right 1 (by positivity)
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left this n_pos) (mul_inv_cancel₀ n_pos.ne').le
      calc
        ((n + 1).factorial : ℝ) = (n + 1) * n.factorial := by simp [Nat.factorial_succ, cast_mul]
        _ > (n + 1) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) := by gcongr; exact ih hn
        _ = e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) * (e / (1 + 1 / n) ^ n) := by
          field_simp [n_pos, (exp_pos 1).ne']
          rw [pow_succ, mul_pow]
          field_simp [n_pos, (exp_pos 1).ne']
          ring
        _ > e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) * 1 := by
          gcongr
          rw [one_lt_div (pow_pos (by positivity) _)]
          exact h₁
        _ = e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) := mul_one _
    · norm_num
      rw [div_lt_iff (exp_pos _), mul_comm]
      exact lt_mul_of_div_lt (by norm_num) two_lt_exp_one
